truthPolicy: Generated files are not implemented audio until they are copied into the shipped asset set, wired to a real runtime event, browser-played, and mix-reviewed.

storyVoice.need: Opening, founder prelude, Chapter 1 milestone callbacks, Zach responses, and graduation; captions must exactly match voice manifest text.

stationTutorials.need: Two-phase shop tour and every playable production-task tutorial must trigger its declared Zach clip.

equipmentSequences.need: Bandsaw and VMC power, clamp/door, spindle, coolant, G0 rapid, G1 cutter-specific engagement, tool change, stop, inspection, and result cues in physical order. The legacy generic cnc_cycle prompt is intentionally unused; cutter-specific recordings are authoritative.

uiFeedback.need: Terminal, customer phone, planning, mission, quality, reward, and facility-unlock feedback with no duplicate or misleading confirmation.

ambience.need: Small-shop loop at 0.16 default, independent opt-out, narration duck to 38 percent of ambience level, and guaranteed unduck on end, error, mute, skip, or replacement.

music.need: Founding Dawn, Garage Shift, Precision Run, Inspection Focus, Planning Office, and Factory Expansion require a music bus, transitions, independent volume/opt-out, ducking policy, and browser E2E before use.

mixAndAccessibility.need: Master/voice/SFX/ambience controls and visible narration exist; final loudness normalization, captions mode, audio descriptions where needed, device review, and fatigue listening remain.
